title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
snippet: South Korean chip startup Xcena is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida
snippet: The explosion is likely a major setback for Jeff Bezos' spaceflight company, and its attempt to compete with SpaceX.
